## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bash scripts/ci-checks.sh` passes locally
- [ ] If I added/removed/renamed a skill: updated `skills-manifest.json` **and** README counts/lists
- [ ] If I edited a doc with an HTML twin: ran `python3 scripts/render-docs.py` and committed the twins
- [ ] Bilingual landing pages stay balanced (every `data-en` has a `data-zh`)
- [ ] No machine-specific paths (`/home/<me>/…`) and no secrets committed
- [ ] External sources credited in `CREDITS.md` (and upstream license included in the skill folder)
- [ ] I did not relicense the Apache-2.0 `code-review` family
